mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is low and its 3-month trend is flat or falling, equity discount rates remain suppressed and liquidity supports risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with flat or falling 3-month FEDFUNDS trends produce 20-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean in more than 60% of walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE crossing above 6.0% signals deteriorating labor income and weaker consumption expectations, causing investors to mark down earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 6.0% or rises by more than 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS rises over 3 months while FEDFUNDS remains below 1.0%, consumer demand expands without a material discount-rate headwind, increasing expected revenues and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month change is positive and FEDFUNDS is below 1.0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not outperform cases where RSAFS rises without low FEDFUNDS, or if triggered 20-day returns are negative on average.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO below its 6-month moving average signals weakening production and future earnings pressure for cyclical firms, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside cross signals are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations or have no negative return spread versus non-triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A HOUST crossing above 1000 thousand units indicates strengthening housing demand and construction activity, lifting cyclical earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST upside crossings above 1000 are not followed by above-median 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the average triggered return is less than zero.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates over 3 months while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%, investors price a future policy tightening shock and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change exceeds 3.0% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-acceleration and low-FEDFUNDS condition produces nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or does not underperform low-FEDFUNDS periods without CPI acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS grows over 3 months and UNRATE falls below 6.0%, improving employment income supports consumption and earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below 6.0% and PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have lower average 5-day S&P 500 returns than all other observations or if positive hit rate is below 50% after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 is above its prior-quarter level and INDPRO is above its 12-month average, broad demand and production momentum reinforce earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter change is positive and INDPRO is above its 12-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and above-average INDPRO condition fails to generate positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns or has a Rank IC below 0.03 in rolling 3-year tests.
